query:
SELECT DATE(createdAt) AS createdDate, COUNT(*) AS totalProducts, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS syncedRows, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unsyncedRows FROM products GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY createdDate DESC LIMIT 7;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS targetBatchCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS targetSyncedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS targetUnsyncedCount FROM products WHERE batchNo REGEXP '^005000252';
command:

SELECT COUNT(*) AS targetBatchCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS targetSyncedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetRowNumber IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS targetUnsyncedCount FROM products WHERE batchNo REGEXP '^005000252';
